g.onclick: sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, explain the role of the UI layer and what it should and should not know about')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, explain DebugCore as a facade — what does it wrap and why does the UI only talk to this?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show me the full IDebugger interface with all methods and explain why they are designed this way')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show the GDBMIWriter class — how does it prepend tokens and write to the GDB stdin pipe?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show the GDBMIReader class in detail — how does the reader thread work, what does it block on, and how does it dispatch records?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show GDBMIParser — how does it parse result records, async records, and stream records from raw MI lines?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show BreakpointManager — how does it use async callbacks to issue -break-insert and track breakpoint IDs?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show VariableManager — how does it use promise/future to bridge the async MI channel into a blocking API?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show DebugStateMachine — what are the valid states and which transitions are allowed?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show EventDispatcher — how does it safely dispatch DebugEvent to all registered IDebugEventListener instances from the reader thread?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show GDBProcess — how does it fork arm-none-eabi-gdb and set up the stdin/stdout pipes?')
sendPrompt('In the STM32 debugger redesign, show OpenOCDProcess — how does it start openocd and poll until port 3333 is listening before GDB connects?')
